summary: Comprehensive testing of LexiSense new features: Contract Workflow/Approval System, Audit Logging, In-app Notifications, Recharts Analytics, and RBAC. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly including workflow transitions, notification bell, theme toggle, audit log page, and analytics charts.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/contracts/workflow/states returns valid states
Backend: New contract upload starts with 'draft' status
Backend: POST /api/contracts/:id/workflow/submit_for_review transitions draft->review
Backend: POST /api/contracts/:id/workflow/approve transitions review->approved
Backend: POST /api/contracts/:id/workflow/activate transitions approved->active
Backend: POST /api/contracts/:id/workflow/reject transitions review->draft
Backend: GET /api/contracts/:id/workflow/history returns full history
Backend: Invalid workflow transitions return 400 error
Backend: GET /api/audit returns audit logs
Backend: Audit logs can be filtered by resource_type
Backend: Contract upload creates audit log entry
Backend: Workflow actions create audit log entries
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns notifications list
Backend: GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns count
Backend: POST /api/notifications/read-all marks all as read
Backend: Admin role can access audit logs
Backend: Admin role can perform all workflow actions
Frontend: Login and navigate to Dashboard
Frontend: Notification bell icon visible in header with dropdown
Frontend: Theme toggle works (dark/light)
Frontend: Sidebar includes Audit Log navigation item
Frontend: Contracts page shows contracts with status badges
Frontend: Contract detail shows workflow progress bar (Draft->In Review->Approved->Active)
Frontend: Contract detail shows workflow action buttons based on status
Frontend: Clicking Submit for Review changes contract status to 'In Review'
Frontend: Approve and Reject buttons appear after submitting for review
Frontend: Analytics page shows Recharts charts (PieChart, BarChart, LineChart)
Frontend: Audit Log page loads at /audit route with filter dropdown
Frontend: Audit Log shows workflow actions with transition details
Frontend: Team page allows inviting with all 4 roles (admin/manager/user/viewer)
Frontend: Upload Contract dialog works with file upload
seed_data_creation: Test contracts created during testing were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Workflow, Audit, Notifications, RBAC, Recharts) are working correctly. The test user testuser@lexisense.com has admin role which allows all workflow actions. Workflow states: draft->review->approved->active. Audit logs track all contract operations including workflow transitions. Notifications are created for workflow actions. Analytics page has PieChart (risk distribution), BarChart (by type), LineChart (monthly trend). AWS S3 storage is MOCKED.

mocked_apis.AWS S3 storage: MOCKED with placeholder credentials - returns mock storage keys
